pi_items.source: Verified via install_gvsig.sh, which downloads real Natural Earth "ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines" data and places it at this path.
Task verification logic (verifier.py, export_result.sh) strictly enforces outputting the file to this exact path.
Confirmed via epsg.io that 32633 is WGS 84 / UTM zone 33N, matching the task description. verifier.py also enforces this EPSG code.
Verified via O*NET Online (onetonline.org) that 17-2051.02 corresponds exactly to "Water/Wastewater Engineers".
Verified as matching the standard SOC major group 17-0000 ("Architecture and Engineering Occupations") covering this occupation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Natural Earth physical dataset (ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines), which is downloaded during environment setup to /home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp. The task requires reprojecting this shapefile to EPSG:32633 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 33N) and saving it to /home/ga/gvsig_exports/rivers_utm33n.shp. The verifier and export scripts strictly enforce these file paths and check the output CRS using osgeo.ogr. The targeted occupation and industry correctly correspond to valid O*NET/SOC classifications (17-2051.02, 17-0000).
